response.justification: Candidate brings 13+ years of full-stack experience well beyond the 6+ year requirement, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js work at Optilyz and current AI-agent/MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq that aligns tightly with the role's AI agent development requirement. Strong craftsmanship signals (TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, teaching, open-source platform ownership) and React/MongoDB/AWS exposure cover most of the stack. Gaps around Nest.js, Kotlin, and Vitest specifically are minor given the breadth and depth of adjacent experience.
strengths: Direct AI-agent and MCP infrastructure experience at current role matches a key requirement
Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB/AWS background from Optilyz and RIDE Capital
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD advocacy, open-source maintainer, conference speaker, workshop instructor
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the resume
No Kotlin experience; Java exposure is dated (robotic arms work ~2016-2018)
Heavy DLang focus across several roles may not transfer directly to the primary stack
